untranslatable_reason: Volatility threshold logic ('volatility exceeds 20-day MA by 50%') cannot be precisely expressed with allowed indicators. hvol_20 is in decimal scale and requires complex relative comparison. Regime state machine with threshold-based transitions (green→yellow→red) is not natively supported by simple condition logic. Position-sizing modulation and signal rejection rules are operational/execution directives, not testable conditions.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a regime-based position management framework rather than a simple entry/exit rule. The core mechanism uses ADX as the primary regime health indicator (ADX < 15 = yellow, ADX < 10 = red). The 12% and 20% adverse move thresholds and volatility spike conditions cannot be cleanly translated into the three-field condition format. The three-light system (green/yellow/red) with corresponding actions (accept all / liquidate existing / liquidate all) is properly captured in the regime_filter and position_management objects, but the exact transition triggers involving price moves and vol ratios are not fully translatable.
